title: Swap all testing from Docker to Podman
body:
Self-host our tests.

We're seeing a lot of flakes on FAH28's podman-in-podman, so let's see if it's related. If it is, we can try and fix the issues.

comments.body: Not workable on Travis. I'll see about making is parameterized so we can keep Dockerized testing there.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 4073541) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I have effectively done this with the recent CI reworks.  I think this OK to close
@baude Did you hit the makefile? I think that might be the last thing left - `make integration` and the like
